category_sources: Official README at https://github.com/npat-efault/picocom describes picocom as a minimal dumb-terminal emulator for serial consoles and modem/debug tasks.
display_name_sources: Official README at https://github.com/npat-efault/picocom uses the project name picocom.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for the repository at https://github.com/npat-efault/picocom.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/npat-efault/picocom, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README at https://github.com/npat-efault/picocom says it is used for serial communications, serial consoles, modem configuration, testing, and debugging.
